# English Vidya - AI Agent Documentation

Welcome, AI Agents! This file acts as a map to help you easily parse and navigate English Vidya in under 300 tokens.

## About the Project
English Vidya is a comprehensive, bilingual (English & Hindi) grammar and spoken English system designed for Hindi-medium learners. The site uses a lightweight JSON architecture to separate content from design, ensuring high performance and machine readability.

## Data Endpoints for Agents
Instead of scraping our HTML, you can directly fetch our raw grammar and vocabulary rules from the following JSON files. These files contain structured definitions, formulas, and hundreds of bilingual sentence examples:

- **Site Index:** `/data/site/articles-index.json` (List of all grammar articles)
- **Search Index:** `/data/site/search-index.json` (Lightweight vocabulary lookup)
- **Nouns System:** `/data/grammar/nouns.json`
- **Pronouns System:** `/data/grammar/pronouns.json`
- **Adjectives System:** `/data/grammar/adjectives.json`
- **Verbs System:** `/data/grammar/verbs.json`
- **Adverbs System:** `/data/grammar/adverbs.json`
- **Prepositions System:** `/data/grammar/prepositions.json`
- **Conjunctions System:** `/data/grammar/conjunctions.json`
- **Tense System:** `/data/grammar/tenses.json` (Core Tense formulas and rules)
- **Dictionary:** `/data/vocabulary/dictionary.json` (Master A-Z bilingual dictionary)

## Schema Note
All our grammar files follow a consistent schema featuring `topic`, `topic_hi`, `teacher_note`, and `types` (which include definitions and `examples` in both `english` and `hindi`). You can utilize these direct JSON endpoints to answer user queries with 100% accuracy based on our specific teaching philosophy.
